tagline: The Last One Standing Wins Everything
description: A reverse-auction game on its own Initia appchain. Players pay 1 INIT to enter, each entry resets a 30-second countdown. The last person to enter before time runs out wins the entire pot. Features AI-powered live commentary via Claude API, session-based auto-signing for one-click entries, cross-chain deposits via Interwoven Bridge, and .init username integration throughout the UI.

tech_stack.frontend: React 18 + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS + Framer Motion
tech_stack.ai: Claude API (claude-sonnet-4-20250514) for live game commentary
